text:
Tue, Jun 24, 2008 at 04:32:48PM +0000, flz@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: flz
> State-Changed-When: Tue Jun 24 16:32:07 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> FreeBSD 4.x isn't supported anymore.  Even if you make the code compile,
> all the support has been removed already.

Then pkg-descr should be changed.  Just now it states
-----
This is mainly useful on FreeBSD systems <= 4.10.
-----
-- 
Eygene
